benefits.description: Deviated septum surgery stopped bleeding literally the next day after surgery
Used wolverine stack (BPC157 + TB500) for surgical recovery with loading phase before and after surgeries

protocol_notes: Recommends loading phase starting ~2 weeks before surgery and running for 2-3 months through recovery. Did not take any breaks during the protocol. Notes that BPC157 is known to interact with old forms of general anaesthetic (1980s era) but not with modern GA. Told anaesthesiologist about usage who said it made no difference.
